name: dropdown-menu-radio-group
visual_summary: The dropdown-menu-radio-group is a versatile UI component that presents a list of options to users, allowing them to select one or multiple radio-based choices within a contained dropdown menu. It is suitable for various use cases, including surveys, quiz questions, or preferences. Developers can rely on this component when requiring users to make a choice from several options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Description: The dropdown-menu-radio-group is a versatile UI component that presents a list of options to users, allowing them to select one or multiple radio-based choices within a contained dropdown menu.
